theme.description: High-conversion premium agency style. Deep midnight navy background with electric blue, cyan, purple, and magenta neon glows. Feels like a top-tier tech product (Vercel/Framer level) with cinematic 3D lighting.

typography.guidelines: Sora for bold, futuristic, tech-oriented headings (breaking standard AI patterns). Manrope for clean, highly legible body copy suitable for local business owners. Do NOT use Inter or Space Grotesk for headings.

scale.h1: text-4xl md:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black tracking-tight leading-tight

layout_spacing.general: Mobile-first, generous spacing (p-6, p-8, py-20, py-32).
layout_spacing.grid: Bento-style grids for features and services. gap-6 to gap-8. Asymmetric spanning (col-span-4 vs col-span-8).

surfaces_and_components.solid_card: bg-[#090B18] border border-white/5 shadow-2xl relative overflow-hidden
surfaces_and_components.glow_effects: Use absolute positioned elements with bg-gradient-to-r and blur-3xl for ambient lighting behind cards.
surfaces_and_components.buttons: Primary CTA uses glowing electric blue or magenta. Secondary CTA uses glassmorphism. Hover states must increase brightness.
surfaces_and_components.forms: Heavily customized Shadcn forms. Inputs should have transparent backgrounds, bottom border or subtle full border, focus ring in cyan/purple.

motion_interactions.hover: Cards lift slightly (-translate-y-1) with increased neon border glow.
motion_interactions.entrance: Staggered fade-up for bento grids and lists.
motion_interactions.hero: Rotating headline words (e.g., 'Startups', 'Salons', 'CA Firms') using framer-motion AnimatePresence.

hero_3d_direction.style: Cinematic 'Built for Builders' theme. Architectural cubes, glowing neon edges.
hero_3d_direction.implementation: Hybrid approach. CSS-styled 3D floating UI cards overlapping, backed by light tsparticles or pure CSS ambient radial gradients.
hero_3d_direction.layout: Bold left-aligned text (h1 + tagline), red/blue/purple CTA. Right side has floating laptops/browsers showing demo concepts.

media_urls.description: Primary architectural 3D reference 'Built for Builders' for the hero section.
Use as ambient background overlay with low opacity or mask for glowing sections.
Use in the Before/After or Services grid to showcase tech prowess.
Use for the 'World growing out of digital screen' or city visuals.
Reference for neon gradients and 3D card styling.

testing.mandatory_attributes: All interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs, accordions) MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="hero-cta-button"`).

instructions_to_main_agent: Build out a premium UI in React using standard HTML elements combined with Tailwind classes for layouts.
Use Shadcn components for complex interactions but strip their default styling via Tailwind to match the dark neon aesthetic.
Do NOT use Testimonials (per user explicit request). Replace with 'Live Demo Concepts'.
Industries grid: 14 business types using Bento UI.
Include Lead Gen dashboard visual, AI Chatbot section (bottom-right live bot), Contact Form (11 fields).
Sticky mobile bottom CTA bar with Call/WhatsApp/Pricing/Contact actions.
